name: Caviar Cloud Eggs with Truffle Brioche & Brown Butter Hollandaise Foam
description: A Michelin-level brunch reimagining eggs Benedict: airy whipped egg white clouds encasing a molten yolk, set atop vacuum-infused truffle brioche, finished with brown butter hollandaise foam, herb emulsion accents, and premium caviar.
keywords: cloud eggs, truffle brioche, caviar brunch, michelin style breakfast, hollandaise foam, molecular gastronomy, fine dining eggs

steps.instruction: Prepare sous vide yolks: Place egg yolks with a small amount of clarified butter into a vacuum bag. Cook in a precision immersion circulator at 63°C (145°F) for 35 minutes until custard-like.

Make herb emulsion: Blend herbs, neutral oil, spinach, and lemon zest until smooth. Strain through a fine chinois. Spread onto an anti-griddle to create delicate frozen sheets, then break into organic shapes.
Infuse brioche: Lightly butter brioche slices and layer with shaved black truffle. Vacuum seal to compress and infuse flavor. Toast gently until golden and aromatic.

Prepare brown butter hollandaise: Brown butter until nutty. Whisk egg yolks with champagne vinegar over bain-marie until thickened. Slowly emulsify in brown butter, then add lemon juice and cayenne. Strain and transfer to a siphon, charge with N2O, and keep warm.
Create cloud eggs: Whip egg whites with cream of tartar to stiff peaks. Spoon into nests on parchment and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 3 minutes. Add yolk center and bake an additional 2 minutes.
Assembly: Place toasted truffle brioche on plate, top with cloud egg, and carefully insert sous vide yolk.
Plating: Dispense hollandaise foam tableside, add a quenelle of caviar, arrange herb emulsion pieces, microgreens, and edible flowers. Finish with gold leaf if desired.

winePairings.name: Vintage Champagne
winePairings.notes: High acidity cuts through the richness of hollandaise and enhances the caviar.

winePairings.name: White Burgundy (Meursault)
winePairings.notes: Buttery texture complements brioche and brown butter flavors.
